name: Marincess Cascade
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>海晶乙女瀑布</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マリンセス・カタラクト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Banish any number of "Marincess" Link Monsters you control (until your next Standby Phase), then target 1 face-up monster on the field; it gains ATK equal to the total Link Rating of the monsters banished to activate this card x 300, until the end of this turn. If you control a Link-3 or higher "Marincess" monster, you can activate this card from your hand.
eff: Banish any number of "Marincess" Link Monsters you control (until your next Standby Phase), then target 1 face-up monster on the field; it gains ATK equal to the total Link Rating of the monsters banished to activate this card x 300, until the end of this turn. If you control a Link-3 or higher "Marincess" monster, you can activate this card from your hand.

action: Returns banished cards to the field
mst: Can be activated from the hand
